{{Infobox concept
| name = Diamond Veins
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Diamond Veins Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Diamond Veins refers to a specialized elixir or prize that can be earned, such as through the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament. When consumed, this substance is processed over a period of three days to transform the user's madra channels, making them as resilient and pure as a [[diamond]]. This transformation is essential for certain users to prevent their channels from being destroyed during intense techniques or when utilizing powerful elixirs. Once integrated, the Diamond Veins can stabilize a user's madra channels even under extreme pressure, and in some cases, they contribute to the strengthening of the user's spirit well and the unification of their body and spirit.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] mentions needing the [[Diamond Veins]] to avoid her channels being shredded by the technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Diamond Veins is recognized as a high-value item with a cost of 2000 points. [[Lindon]] initially hopes that [[Northstrider]] will provide him with the item as a gift. The importance of the object is proven when it prevents [[Yerin]]'s madra channels from tearing apart during her technique. Later, a copy of the Diamond Veins held by [[Ruby]] is shown to have progressed.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Diamond Veins]] costs 2000 points.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Diamond Veins]] is a high-value item.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] hopes [[Northstrider]] will gift him [[Diamond Veins]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Without the [[Diamond Veins]], [[Yerin]]'s madra channels would have torn apart during the technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]]'s copy of [[Yerin]]'s [[Diamond Veins]] progressed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] absorbed the [[Diamond Veins]] won in the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has absorbed the [[Diamond Veins]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
